name: nats
summary: Subscribes to a NATS subject and emits received messages.

subject.description: Subject to subscribe to. Supports wildcards (* and >).

queue.description: Queue group name. When set, messages are distributed across group members — use this for safe multi-replica operation.

prefetch_count.description: Number of messages to prefetch per subscription.

auth.description: NATS authentication. String fields support ${ENV_VAR} interpolation via spec.secretRefs.

nkey_file.description: Path to an NKey seed file. Mutually exclusive with user_credentials_file and user_jwt/user_nkey_seed.

user_credentials_file.description: Path to a NATS credentials file (.creds) containing a signed user JWT and NKey seed. Mutually exclusive with the other auth methods.

user_jwt.description: User JWT for decentralized auth. Must be combined with user_nkey_seed. Supports ${ENV_VAR}.

user_nkey_seed.description: NKey seed used to sign the user_jwt challenge. Supports ${ENV_VAR}.

tls.description: TLS configuration for encrypted NATS connections.

enabled.description: Enable TLS. Automatically active when using nats+tls:// or tls:// URLs.

skip_cert_verify.description: Disable server certificate verification. Not recommended for production.

root_cas.description: PEM-encoded root CA certificate(s) for verifying the server certificate.

root_cas_file.description: Path to a PEM file containing root CA certificate(s).

cert_file.description: Path to the PEM-encoded certificate file.

key_file.description: Path to the PEM-encoded private key file.
